chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.245 of 2024 Pakistan Civil Aviation Authority Versus M/s Kohisar Enterprises and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing Case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing on CMA No.1446/2024 (Stay). 4. For hearing on Misc. No.1447/2024..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.08.2024 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. After detailed arguments, learned counsel for the appellant submits that he would not press this appeal and would comply the orders of learned single Judge. The appeal is dismissed a not pressed along with pending applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
